meta.title: Carrier Bridge — AI-powered road carrier sourcing
meta.description: The AI agent that scans 100,000 European road carriers to feed your tenders with the most relevant operators. Save time, negotiate better, secure quality of service.

hero.subtitle: Our AI agent deeply analyses 100,000 European carrier websites to feed your tenders with the most relevant operators — and secure the best prices and quality of service.

mockup.label: Natural-language search
mockup.query: 30 ADR class 3 tankers, Italy ↔ Northern France lane

trust.label: Built for Transport Procurement and Supply Chain teams

problem.title: Carrier sourcing, as it's done today, is broken.
problem.subtitle: Procurement teams keep tendering the same carriers year after year. Meanwhile, hundreds of perfectly qualified operators stay invisible — and savings stay out of reach.

items.title: Always the same carriers
items.text: Your tenders revolve around a small circle of known operators. Without market visibility, you miss the best fit.

items.title: Manual, slow, incomplete sourcing
items.text: Identifying new qualified carriers takes weeks of manual prospecting on Google, trade shows and word-of-mouth.

items.title: No objective pre-qualification
items.text: Fleet, certifications, lanes, specialisations: comparing carriers without structured data is nearly impossible.

features.title: Everything you need to source the right carrier
features.subtitle: A complete platform built for Transport Procurement teams, from brief to qualified shortlist.

items.title: Natural-language search
items.text: Describe your need like you would to a colleague. The AI understands business criteria (ADR, reefer, bulk, lanes, certifications).

items.title: 100,000-carrier database
items.text: Full European coverage. Each carrier is deeply analysed from its website and public sources.

items.title: Automatic pre-qualification
items.text: Fleet, size, lanes, certifications, specialisations: every key criterion is extracted and structured.

items.title: Qualified shortlist
items.text: Receive a list ranked by relevance, with detailed match information for every operator surfaced.

items.title: Enriched tender pipeline
items.text: Multiply the number of carriers consulted per tender. More competition, better prices.

items.title: Export & integrations
items.text: Export to your TMS, ERP or tender tool. Custom integrations available for enterprise accounts.

howItWorks.title: From brief to shortlist in less than a minute
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to transform your carrier sourcing.

steps.title: Describe your need
steps.text: Type of goods, lanes, volume, certifications, specialisations. In natural language or via structured form.

steps.title: The AI scans 100,000 carriers
steps.text: Semantic analysis of the entire European database against all your criteria, in parallel.

steps.title: Receive your shortlist
steps.text: A qualified list ranked by relevance, with match details and useful contacts.

steps.title: Launch your tender
steps.text: Consult more carriers, compare objectively, negotiate from a stronger position.

agent.subtitle: Our agent understands your business. It interprets complex queries combining fleet, geography, goods and certifications, and only surfaces carriers that are truly relevant.
bullets: Native understanding of ADR, temperature-controlled, bulk, tanker, reefer, conventional
Fine-grained geography: countries, international lanes, catchment zones
Certifications, fleet size, seniority, sector specialisations

chat.userMessage: I'm looking for a carrier with more than 30 tankers, operating on the Italy ↔ Northern France lane, specialised in dangerous goods (ADR class 3).
chat.aiMessage: I scanned the 100,000-carrier database. Here are the most relevant operators for your need:
chat.result1: TransLogi Spa — 45 ADR tankers (3/6/8), HQ Turin, active FR-IT lane
chat.result2: Chimico Trasporti — 32 tankers, ISO 9001 + SQAS, Milan-based
chat.result3: Nordic Tank Lines — 28 ADR tankers, Lyon, IT/CH/FR coverage

useCases.title: Designed for every transport flow
useCases.subtitle: Whatever your industry, the AI agent identifies carriers qualified for your specific constraints.

items.title: Chemicals & dangerous goods
items.text: ADR classes, stainless tankers, SQAS certifications. Specialist carriers identified and pre-qualified.

items.title: Food & temperature-controlled
items.text: Reefer, frozen, multi-temperature. IFS Logistics compliance, traceability, short lanes.

items.title: Construction & bulk
items.text: Tippers, flatbeds, solid bulk, heavy loads. Regional and international carriers.

items.title: Retail & e-commerce
items.text: Full truckloads, pallets, B2B deliveries. Multi-country coverage and seasonal capacity.

items.title: Industry & cross-border flows
items.text: Heavy haulage, equipment, import/export flows. Country and goods specialists.

faq.title: Everything you want to know
faq.subtitle: Can't find your answer? Reach out, we reply within 24 hours.

items.q: How does the AI analyse 100,000 carrier websites?
items.a: Our analysis engine continuously crawls the public websites of European carriers, extracts business information (fleet, lanes, certifications, specialisations) and structures it into a semantically searchable database.

items.q: Is the platform aimed at carriers?
items.a: No. Carrier Bridge is exclusively designed for shippers: manufacturers, distributors, traders and their Transport Procurement and Supply Chain teams.
Yes. Your queries, tenders and shortlists are strictly confidential. European hosting, GDPR compliance, encryption in transit and at rest.

items.q: Is it compatible with my TMS or tender tool?
items.a: Yes. The platform offers standard exports (CSV, Excel) and custom integrations (API, webhooks) with the leading TMS and ERP solutions.
The full European Union, the United Kingdom, Switzerland and Norway. Eastern European and Balkan countries are also covered.
Standard onboarding takes a few days. A personalised demo lets you test the agent on your own use cases in less than an hour.

contact.title: Ready to transform your carrier sourcing?
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your context, we'll set up a demo focused on your flows and constraints.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: Annual transport volume, main lanes, flow types, constraints…
form.success: Thank you! Your request has been sent. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or write to hello@carrierbridge.com.

footer.tagline: The AI agent for European road carrier sourcing.
